title: moraea lurida
intro: Moraea lurida, also known as yellow trefoil, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the family Iridaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of various health issues. The plant is said to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations, wounds, and infections, as well as exhibit antioxidant properties to reduce oxidative stress. In herbal preparations, Moraea lurida can be used to create teas, infusions, and salves, which are believed to promote overall health and well-being.
